doc.content: Canonical monorepo requirements narrative. Use this as the human-readable source of truth for repo-wide scope, workflow rules, and planning policy.
Cross-cutting queue for shared monorepo work. Use this when the next action spans multiple sections or changes shared policy.
Human-readable section and root overview table. Use this to understand section status before choosing a planner-specific queue.
Global planning state for the docs-first loop. Read with global roadmap, task registry, and decisions when the work is cross-section or workflow-related.
Repo-root REQUIREMENTS.md is a stub pointer only. Do not duplicate long-form requirements prose there.
